questions: What are the types of taxes?
answers: Taxation is the system by which governments collect money from individuals and businesses to fund public services like roads, schools, healthcare, and defense.
Tax holo shorkaar er taka joma korar poddhoti — nagoriik ar business theke taka niye shorkaar road, school, hospital, ar onnanno sheba dey.
Main types of taxes include income tax (on earnings), sales tax/VAT (on purchases), property tax (on real estate), corporate tax (on business profits), and customs duty (on imports).
We pay taxes because they fund essential public services and infrastructure. Without taxes, there would be no public roads, schools, hospitals, police, or military.
